title: I am safe with a full account
subtitle: A release-and-allow energy statement for the discomfort of holding money.
excerpt: A short energy statement for when a full bank account still feels precarious. The statement releases the fear of holding large sums and allows the new experience of safety with wealth.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 36 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release-and-allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you open your banking app and notice a tightness at seeing the balance, or when a large payment lands and you can't quite let it feel safe.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 36 of the MONEY program. It works with the specific pattern of tension around a full account: the part that watches the balance waiting for a problem, that can't quite settle into the number being good.
I am ready to release all fear of holding large amounts of money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow safety and ease with a full account. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). This statement is adapted from the Day 36 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
